title: Support for always #0 syntax
body:
iverilog appears to reject `always #0`... syntax. The parser mistakes `#0` as expressing zero delay, when in fact the meaning of `#0` is about pinning evaluation until the end of the current timestep.

As a workaround, I am nesting my `#0` expressions inside of a larger `#1` block:

```systemverilog
always #1 begin
    #0 ...
end
```
